script.name: Advanced input - IronPython
script.code:
import clr
clr.AddReference("TCAdmin.SDK")
clr.AddReference("TCAdmin.GameHosting.SDK")
clr.AddReference("TCAdmin.Scripting")
clr.AddReference("TCAdmin.Monitor")
clr.AddReference("TCAdmin.Web.Shared")

from System import *
from System.Collections.Generic import *
from TCAdmin.SDK.DynamicInput.Controls import *
from TCAdmin.Web.Shared.Models.DynamicInput import *

msgResult = ThisScript.ShowMessageBox("Question", "Should I ask for values using a dialog?", yesText="Yes", noText="No", cancelText="Cancel").Result

if msgResult is None:
    ThisScript.Alert("😔 Canceled", "Canceled by user!")
else:
    print("Asking for values...")

    item1 = DynamicTextBox()
    item1.Id = "1"
    item1.Label = "Enter first value"
    item1.Description = "I'm going to do something with this value"
    item1.DefaultValue = ""
    item1.Required = False

    item2 = DynamicTextBox()
    item2.Id = "2"
    item2.Label = "Enter second value"
    item2.Description = "This value is optional"
    item2.DefaultValue = "I set a default value"
    item2.Required = False

    item3 = DynamicSwitch()
    item3.Id = "3"
    item3.Label = "Uncheck this"
    item3.DefaultValue = False
    item3.Required = False
    item3.CheckedValue = "On"
    item3.UncheckedValue = "Off"

    item4 = DynamicCheckBox()
    item4.Id = "4"
    item4.Label = "Child value (only visible if parent is checked)"
    item4.DefaultValue = False
    item4.Required = False
    item4.CheckedValue = "On"
    item4.UncheckedValue = "Off"
    item4.ParentId = "3"
    item4.ParentValue = "On"

    item5 = DynamicNumericTextBox()
    item5.Id = "5"
    item5.Label = "Enter a numeric value"
    item5.Description = "This value is required"
    item5.DefaultValue = None
    item5.Required = True

    item6 = DynamicComboBox()
    item6.Id = "6"
    item6.Label = "Select from the list"
    item6.Description = "This value is required"
    item6.DefaultValue = None
    item6.Required = True

    item6.Items.Add(DynamicComboBoxItem())
    item6.Items[0].Text = "Value 1"
    item6.Items[0].Value = "1"
    item6.Items.Add(DynamicComboBoxItem())
    item6.Items[1].Text = "Value 2"
    item6.Items[1].Value = "2"

    inputConfig = InputConfiguration()
    inputConfig.IsDialog = msgResult
    inputConfig.AllowCancel = True

    result = ThisScript.Input(inputConfig, item1, item2, item3, item4, item5, item6).Result

    if result.Canceled:
        ThisScript.Alert("😔 Canceled", "Canceled by user!");
    else:
        print("------------------------------------------------------------------------------")
        print("Value 1: %s" % result.Values["1"])
        print("Value 2: %s" % result.Values["2"])
        print("Value 3: %s" % result.Values["3"])
        print("Value 4: %s" % result.Values["4"])
        print("Value 5: %s" % result.Values["5"])
        print("Value 6: %s" % result.Values["6"])
        print("------------------------------------------------------------------------------")
        ThisScript.Alert("Success", f"The {len(result.Values)} values were captured successfully!")
        # ReturnValue = "First: %s Second: %s" % (result.Values["1"], result.Values["2"])

script.name: C# - Start file
script.description: Creates start.cmd in the game's folder so the service can be created

Cuscom Query Protocol - IronPython
script.code:
import clr
clr.AddReference("TCAdmin.SDK")

import System
from TCAdmin.SDK.Hubs.Models.GameQuery import GameQueryResponse

rand = System.Random.Shared

returnValue = GameQueryResponse()
returnValue.Status = "online"
returnValue.Hostname = ThisService.Name
returnValue.Name = ThisService.Name
returnValue.Map = "TestMap"
returnValue.NumPlayers = rand.Next(0, ThisService.Slots)
returnValue.MaxPlayers = ThisService.Slots
returnValue.Success = True

ReturnValue = returnValue
